message:
Add divmod builtin, fix ValueError/subprocess handling

- math.zig: Add genDivmod for divmod(a,b) builtin
- misc.zig: Handle raise ValueError("msg") with ExceptionTypes map
- imports.zig: Check isBuiltinModule before isLocalModule
- assign.zig: Skip functions that reference skipped modules

files.patch:
@@ -25,6 +25,7 @@ const BuiltinMap = std.StaticStringMap(BuiltinHandler).initComptime(.{
     .{ "sum", builtins.genSum },
     .{ "round", builtins.genRound },
     .{ "pow", builtins.genPow },
+    .{ "divmod", builtins.genDivmod },
     // Collections
     .{ "all", builtins.genAll },
     .{ "any", builtins.genAny },
